name: Pasta Sundried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 quarts of water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the whole wheat pasta and regular pasta to the boiling water.
3. If using Mrs. Dash seasoning, add it at this time (optional).
4. Stir occasionally until the pasta is cooked through, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Drain the pasta and transfer to a serving dish.
6. In a saucepan over low heat, combine the tomato paste with the chopped sun-dried tomatoes and crushed garlic.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently, until the water has evaporated and the mixture is well combined.
8. Serve the pasta topped with the sun-dried tomato and garlic sauce.
